description: Thin REST facade over the SurgeGraph MCP tool surface. One operation per MCP tool, wire-compatible with the OAuth 2.1 bearer tokens issued by https://mcp.surgegraph.io. Generated by `bun run --filter @apps/mcp export:openapi`.

env_var_specs.name: SURGEGRAPH_TOKEN
env_var_specs.description: OAuth 2.1 bearer token issued by https://mcp.surgegraph.io/token. Populated by 'surgegraph-pp-cli auth login --browser' (Authorization Code + PKCE + Dynamic Client Registration). Refresh token rotation honored.

tools.name: surgegraph-facade_search
tools.description: Search the surgegraph-facade API for endpoints matching a natural-language query. Returns a ranked list of {endpoint_id, method, path, summary} entries. Call this first to find the endpoint to execute.

params.name: query
params.description: Natural-language query (keywords, intent, resource names). Used by an in-process ranker to score endpoint summaries.

params.name: limit
params.description: Optional maximum number of ranked endpoint matches to return (default: 10).

tools.name: surgegraph-facade_execute
tools.description: Execute one surgegraph-facade API endpoint by its endpoint_id (from surgegraph-facade_search). Params are passed as a JSON object; path placeholders and query strings are resolved automatically.

params.name: endpoint_id
params.description: Endpoint identifier returned by surgegraph-facade_search (dotted form, e.g. "users.list").

params.name: params
params.description: JSON object of params; path placeholders, query strings, and request bodies are resolved from this object.
